title: phyllanthus stipularis
intro: Phyllanthus stipularis, also known as Cheesefruit or Malay apple, is a tropical fruit-bearing plant native to Southeast Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to combat various health issues. The plant's extracts are known to provide health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Phyllanthus stipularis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, making it accessible for those seeking to harness its medicinal properties.
